req.title: Cheque deposit by mobile
req.statement: A customer shall deposit a cheque via mobile image; cheques above $5,000 shall require manual verification.

doc.reasoning: The requirement defines three distinct behavioral zones: (1) valid cheque images below the $5,000 threshold auto-approve to 'pending' (EP positive path), (2) valid cheque images at exactly $5,000 sit on the boundary and must trigger manual verification (BVA), (3) cheque images at $5,001 exceed the threshold and must be queued for manual decisioning (BVA upper), (4) a corrupt/undecodable image must return HTTP 422 (NEG), and (5) the state transition from 'authenticated + image uploaded' to 'deposit pending + decisioning queued' must be validated end-to-end (STC). A Decision Table test covers the combined flags of image validity × amount threshold to ensure correct decisioning routing. The suite uses a shared 'auth_headers' fixture and a 'cheque_image_payload' helper to keep each test self-contained and idempotent via unique transaction references.

tests.name: test_valid_cheque_below_threshold_returns_pending
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid session token
A well-formed cheque image with decodable MICR line is available
Deposit amount is $1,000 (well within the $5,000 threshold)
actions: POST /deposits/mobile-cheque with valid image payload and amount=1000
Inspect response body for deposit status and decisioning fields
trace: R-FIN-019: amounts below $5,000 do not require manual verification
tests.executable:
def test_valid_cheque_below_threshold_returns_pending(auth_headers, cheque_image_payload):
    payload = cheque_image_payload(amount=1000, ref="TC-EP-001")
    resp = <api_client>.post("/deposits/mobile-cheque", json=payload, headers=auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 202
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "pending"
    assert body["manual_review"] is False
    assert body["deposit_id"]

tests.name: test_corrupt_image_returns_422_micr_decode_failure
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid session token
A corrupt or blank image that cannot be MICR-decoded is available
actions: POST /deposits/mobile-cheque with corrupt image payload and amount=500
Inspect response body for error code and message
trace: R-FIN-019: error pathway - 422 when image fails MICR decode
tests.executable:
def test_corrupt_image_returns_422_micr_decode_failure(auth_headers, corrupt_cheque_payload):
    payload = corrupt_cheque_payload(amount=500, ref="TC-NEG-001")
    resp = <api_client>.post("/deposits/mobile-cheque", json=payload, headers=auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["error_code"] == "MICR_DECODE_FAILURE"
    assert any(kw in body["message"].lower() for kw in ["image", "micr"])

tests.name: test_cheque_at_exactly_5000_triggers_manual_review
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid session token
A well-formed cheque image with decodable MICR line is available
Deposit amount is exactly $5,000 (the defined boundary value)
actions: POST /deposits/mobile-cheque with valid image payload and amount=5000
Inspect response body for manual_review flag and decisioning_queue field
trace: R-FIN-019: cheques above $5,000 require manual verification
R-FIN-019: BVA - exact boundary value $5,000 must route to manual review
tests.executable:
def test_cheque_at_exactly_5000_triggers_manual_review(auth_headers, cheque_image_payload):
    payload = cheque_image_payload(amount=5000, ref="TC-BVA-001")
    resp = <api_client>.post("/deposits/mobile-cheque", json=payload, headers=auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 202
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "pending"
    assert body["manual_review"] is True
    assert body["decisioning_queue"]

tests.name: test_cheque_just_above_5000_queues_decisioning
preconditions: Customer is authenticated and holds a valid session token
A well-formed cheque image with decodable MICR line is available
Deposit amount is $5,001 (one unit above the boundary)
actions: POST /deposits/mobile-cheque with valid image payload and amount=5001
Inspect response body for manual_review flag and decisioning_queue field
trace: R-FIN-019: cheques above $5,000 require manual verification
R-FIN-019: BVA - value just above boundary ($5,001) must also route to manual review
tests.executable:
def test_cheque_just_above_5000_queues_decisioning(auth_headers, cheque_image_payload):
    payload = cheque_image_payload(amount=5001, ref="TC-BVA-002")
    resp = <api_client>.post("/deposits/mobile-cheque", json=payload, headers=auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 202
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "pending"
    assert body["manual_review"] is True
    assert body["decisioning_queue"]

tests.name: test_state_transition_authenticated_to_deposit_pending
preconditions: No prior pending deposit exists for this cheque reference
A well-formed cheque image with decodable MICR line is available
actions: POST /deposits/mobile-cheque with valid image payload and amount=200
Verify status field reflects the expected post-transition state
expected: State has transitioned from initial to 'pending' without intermediate error states
tests.executable:
def test_state_transition_authenticated_to_deposit_pending(auth_headers, cheque_image_payload):
    payload = cheque_image_payload(amount=200, ref="TC-STC-001")
    post_resp = <api_client>.post("/deposits/mobile-cheque", json=payload, headers=auth_headers)
    assert post_resp.status_code == 202
    deposit_id = post_resp.json()["deposit_id"]
    get_resp = <api_client>.get(f"/deposits/{deposit_id}", headers=auth_headers)
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    assert get_resp.json()["status"] == "pending"

tests.name: test_decision_table_valid_image_high_amount_routes_to_manual_queue
actions: POST /deposits/mobile-cheque with valid image and amount=10000
Evaluate response against decision table rule: image_valid=T, above_threshold=T => manual_review=T, status=pending
expected: response.decisioning_queue is non-empty (queued for manual review)
trace: R-FIN-019: cheques above $5,000 shall require manual verification
R-FIN-019: DT rule - valid image AND amount > $5,000 => pending + manual queue
tests.executable:
def test_decision_table_valid_image_high_amount_routes_to_manual_queue(auth_headers, cheque_image_payload):
    payload = cheque_image_payload(amount=10000, ref="TC-DT-001")
    resp = <api_client>.post("/deposits/mobile-cheque", json=payload, headers=auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 202
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "pending"
    assert body["manual_review"] is True
    assert body.get("decisioning_queue"), "Expected a non-empty decisioning_queue for high-value cheque"
